arts.ttl: Craig Bellamy backs Brennan Johnson’s decision to quit social media
arts.sum: The forward has scored in five consecutive Tottenham games since deactivating his Instagram account.

arts.ttl: Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario vows to ignore critics and be a leader
arts.sum: Guglielmo Vicario faced scrutiny after Arsenal scored from a set-piece last month, but has produced a string of fine displays since.

arts.ttl: Brennan Johnson's major change gets huge backing amid 'Ronaldo' goalscoring form
arts.sum: Brennan Johnson’s turnaround came after Spurs boss Ange Postecoglou suggested the striker stopped scrolling through a cesspit of vile abuse

arts.ttl: Team News: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Tottenham Hotspur injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Brighton & Hove Albion and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Pedro Porro makes James Maddison Tottenham feelings clear after ruthless call before Brighton
arts.sum: As a result of his performances for Spurs, Porro has been rewarded on the international stage with a call-up to the Spain squad for the first time since March. Dominic Solanke will also be busy over the October international break after being selected to represent England for the first time in seven years, however Maddison missed out.

arts.ttl: Spurs transfer news: Man City to be rivalled for Italian midfielder?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly preparing to rival Manchester City in the race to sign an Italian midfielder in January.

arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou told he could regret selling striker
arts.sum: Former Tottenham striker Troy Parrott is providing a revelation in Holland where he has made an eye-catching start to his AZ Alkmaar career after leaving Spurs in the summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou positioning Spurs to sign Premier League midfielder with record-breaking clause
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou is a big fan of Eberechi Eze and hopes Spurs will agree to trigger his release clause next summer. The 26-year-old midfielder is one of the Premier League’s most highly-rated playmakers. Strong, quick and technically gifted, the England international has continually been linked with a high-profile transfer. arts.ttl: Tottenham insider thinks Serie A talent will “certainly” be heading to Spurs next summer
arts.sum: Former Tottenham goalkeeper Paul Robinson has stated that Spurs are plotting a move to sign Torino and Italy star Samuele Ricci next summer as the Premier League club will find it hard to get a deal done in January. arts.ttl: 'He's just getting started': Ange Postecoglou says Tottenham have a talent in their ranks who's 'out of this world'
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur boss Ange Postecoglou has steadied the ship in recent weeks, embarking on a five-game winning run. Plenty of Spurs players have stepped up...
